# Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services

> Integrative, evidence-informed psychotherapy in Brooklyn, Manhattan, and via telehealth across New York, Massachusetts, and Oregon.

Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services (BIPS) is a queer-affirming, neurodivergent-affirming, sex-positive mental health practice founded by Dr. Marie Mercado, Psy.D. Clinicians offer primarily psychodynamic treatment alongside modalities such as EMDR, IFS, and AEDP, supporting adults, adolescents, children, and couples.

- Location: 117 Dobbin St, Brooklyn, NY 11222 (Greenpoint) and Union Square, Manhattan
- Phone: 646-881-0305
- Telehealth: Available across NY, MA, and OR

## Services

- [Individual Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/service/individual-therapy): Adult individual therapy organized around collaborative formulation linking current concerns to core affective themes
- [Couples & Relationship Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/relationship-therapy): Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT) for couples at all stages, inclusive of LGBTQIA+ and diverse relationship structures
- [Children & Adolescent Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/children-and-adolescents): Therapy for younger clients using developmentally appropriate, integrative approaches
- [Gender Care Program](https://www.bkintegrative.com/gender-care-program): Specialized affirming services for transgender and gender-diverse clients, informed by contemporary standards of care
- [Clinical Supervision & Consultation](https://www.bkintegrative.com/our-services): Practice-building consultation for early-career and established psychotherapists

## Key Pages

- [Our Team](https://www.bkintegrative.com/our-team): Meet our therapists and their specialties
- [Fees & Insurance](https://www.bkintegrative.com/fees-and-insurance-info): Session rates, sliding scale, and insurance information
- [FAQs](https://www.bkintegrative.com/faqs): Common questions about therapy at BIPS
- [Contact Us](https://www.bkintegrative.com/contact-us): Schedule a consultation or get in touch
